use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ESOPHAGEAL CANDIDIASIS AND PROPHYLAXIS OF CANDIDA INFECTIONS IN HSCT PATIENTS
TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH CANDIDEMIA, ACUTE DISSEMINATED CANDIDIASIS, CANDIDA PERITONITIS AND ABSCESSES

indications.text:
MYCAMINE® is indicated for:
 Treatment of Candidemia, Acute Disseminated Candidiasis, Candida Peritonitis and Abscesses in adult and
pediatric patients 4 months of age and older [see Clinical Studies (14.1) and Use in Specific Populations (8.4)].
